title: Create the world - Challenge
description:
A Minecraft Challenge Datapack
Where you create Blocks under you when walking
body:
This Minecraft Challenge Datapack Makes it That you spawn in a world that is **Empty**

Walking makes blocks appear under you, Sometimes Animals and Villagers can appear
Your goal is to beat the game using them.![An image of an island made of blocks, full of animals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b0989b3298c47822d04f3d46034b2534be262eb.png)

Just Create a new world with the datapack enabled to start the challenge
